menu.title: Warp Points
menu.searchScope.name: Name
menu.warpNoSpace: No available space at warp point.
signEdit.title: Edit Sign Text
config.title: Settings
config.alwaysRegister.name: Always Register as Warp Point
config.alwaysRegister.tooltip: When enabled, the warp checkbox is checked by default for new signs.
config.enableAnimation.name: Enable Warp Animation
config.enableAnimation.tooltip: Play a totem-style animation when warping. Disable for an instant fade.
config.disableHoverText.name: Hide Warp Sign Hover Text
config.disableHoverText.tooltip: Suppress the floating text bubble on signs registered as warp points.
config.rememberSort.name: Remember Sort Option
config.rememberSort.tooltip: Persist the selected sort mode between menu opens and game sessions.
config.rememberFilter.name: Remember Filter Option
config.rememberFilter.tooltip: Persist the favorite filter between menu opens and game sessions.
config.defaultSearchScope.name: Default Search Scope
config.defaultSearchScope.tooltip: The search scope used when opening the warp menu.
config.disableModRequirement.name: Disable Mod Requirement
config.disableModRequirement.tooltip: Skip the Wizard's letter requirement. Warp signs work as soon as a save is loaded.
mail.wizardLetter: Dear @,^I have been reflecting on the peculiar spirits inhabiting the old Community Center - the ones you brought to my attention. Your ability to perceive them suggests a natural sensitivity to the arcane currents that flow through this valley.^While studying these energies, I discovered a simple method to bind a trace of magic to certain objects. With proper enchantment, even something as ordinary as a text sign can act as a focal point for these currents.^Should you place it with purpose, it may anchor a small pathway through the magical field that surrounds us. Those attuned to it, namely yourself, may traverse between these anchors with relative ease.^Think of it as a modest convenience granted through the valley's latent magic, and perhaps a small reward for your assistance in unraveling the junimos' mysteries.^Use this knowledge wisely.^   -M. Rasmodius, Wizard%item object TextSign 1 %%[#]Letter from the Wizard
